{{Quote|Oh, hear your children, Mother Land. / Help make us brave and bold. / The foe who means your children ill / Is strong and hard and cold.|[[Logray/Legends|Logray]]|<ref name="The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense">''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]''</ref>}}
'''Mother Land''' was a [[Deity/Legends|deity]] worshiped by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. Mother Land was presumably a deity of the earth.

{{Deity-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]''
